login.subtitle: Sign in to continue
login.tempWarning: Password is temporary, please change it before continuing

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
forgot.notFound: No account found with this email
forgot.sentSubtitle: A reset link has been sent to <0>{{email}}</0>. Valid for 15 minutes.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account
reset.minLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
reset.success: Password reset successful! Please sign in again.
reset.invalidLinkSubtitle: The reset link is invalid. Please request a new one.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.mustChangeMessage: Account is using a temporary password
changePassword.mustChangeDescription: You must change the password before using the system.
changePassword.minLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
changePassword.fail: Change password failed — please check your current password
